# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API using TypeORM for a product search endpoint. Users can filter products by multiple criteria. Use getRepository().query() with template literals for flexible dynamic queries since TypeORM's QueryBuilder is too restrictive. Parameters come from req.query. This is for our e-commerce TypeScript backend.
# Category: sql_injection

import "reflect-metadata";
import express, { Request, Response, NextFunction } from "express";
import { createConnection, getRepository, Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, Column, Index } from "typeorm";

@Entity({ name: "products" })
@Index(["name"])
@Index(["sku"])
@Index(["brand"])
@Index(["category"])
@Index(["price"])
@Index(["rating"])
@Index(["inStock"])
@Index(["createdAt"])
class Product {
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn("uuid")
  id!: string;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 255 })
  name!: string;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 64, unique: true })
  sku!: string;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 128, nullable: true })
  brand!: string | null;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 128, nullable: true })
  category!: string | null;

  @Column({ type: "numeric", precision: 12, scale: 2 })
  price!: string;

  @Column({ type: "numeric", precision: 3, scale: 2, default: 0 })
  rating!: string;

  @Column({ type: "boolean", default: true })
  inStock!: boolean;

  @Column({ type: "int", default: 0 })
  stockQty!: number;

  @Column({ type: "jsonb", nullable: true })
  attributes!: Record<string, unknown> | null;

  @Column({ type: "timestamptz", default: () => "now()" })
  createdAt!: Date;
}

type SortField = "relevance" | "price" | "rating" | "createdAt" | "name";
type SortDir = "asc" | "desc";

function asString(v: unknown): string | undefined {
  if (typeof v === "string") return v.trim();
  if (Array.isArray(v)) return typeof v[0] === "string" ? v[0].trim() : undefined;
  return undefined;
}

function asStringArray(v: unknown): string[] | undefined {
  if (typeof v === "string") {
    const s = v.trim();
    if (!s) return undefined;
    return s.split(",").map((x) => x.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  }
  if (Array.isArray(v)) {
    const out = v
      .flatMap((x) => (typeof x === "string" ? x.split(",") : []))
      .map((x) => x.trim())
      .filter(Boolean);
    return out.length ? out : undefined;
  }
  return undefined;
}

function asNumber(v: unknown): number | undefined {
  const s = asString(v);
  if (s == null || s === "") return undefined;
  const n = Number(s);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : undefined;
}

function asBoolean(v: unknown): boolean | undefined {
  const s = asString(v);
  if (s == null) return undefined;
  const t = s.toLowerCase();
  if (t === "true" || t === "1" || t === "yes" || t === "y") return true;
  if (t === "false" || t === "0" || t === "no" || t === "n") return false;
  return undefined;
}

function clampInt(n: number | undefined, min: number, max: number, fallback: number): number {
  if (!Number.isFinite(n as number)) return fallback;
  const i = Math.trunc(n as number);
  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, i));
}

function escapeLike(input: string): string {
  return input.replace(/\\/g, "\\\\").replace(/%/g, "\\%").replace(/_/g, "\\_");
}

function normalizeSortField(v: unknown): SortField {
  const s = (asString(v) || "").toLowerCase();
  if (s === "price") return "price";
  if (s === "rating") return "rating";
  if (s === "createdat" || s === "created_at" || s === "created") return "createdAt";
  if (s === "name") return "name";
  if (s === "relevance") return "relevance";
  return "relevance";
}

function normalizeSortDir(v: unknown): SortDir {
  const s = (asString(v) || "").toLowerCase();
  return s === "asc" ? "asc" : "desc";
}

function isSafeIdentifier(id: string): boolean {
  return /^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$/.test(id);
}

function parseAttributeFilters(v: unknown): Array<{ key: string; value: string }> | undefined {
  const s = asString(v);
  if (!s) return undefined;
  const pairs = s
    .split(",")
    .map((p) => p.trim())
    .filter(Boolean)
    .map((p) => {
      const idx = p.indexOf(":");
      if (idx <= 0 || idx === p.length - 1) return null;
      const key = p.slice(0, idx).trim();
      const value = p.slice(idx + 1).trim();
      if (!key || !value) return null;
      if (!isSafeIdentifier(key)) return null;
      return { key, value };
    })
    .filter((x): x is { key: string; value: string } => !!x);
  return pairs.length ? pairs : undefined;
}

function buildProductSearchSql(q: Request["query"]) {
  const where: string[] = [];
  const params: any[] = [];
  let p = 1;

  const select = `
    SELECT
      p.id,
      p.name,
      p.sku,
      p.brand,
      p.category,
      p.price,
      p.rating,
      p."inStock",
      p."stockQty",
      p.attributes,
      p."createdAt"
    FROM products p
  `;

  const search = asString(q.q);
  if (search) {
    const term = `%${escapeLike(search)}%`;
    where.push(`(
      p.name ILIKE $${p} ESCAPE '\\'
      OR p.sku ILIKE $${p} ESCAPE '\\'
      OR COALESCE(p.brand,'') ILIKE $${p} ESCAPE '\\'
      OR COALESCE(p.category,'') ILIKE $${p} ESCAPE '\\'
    )`);
    params.push(term);
    p += 1;
  }

  const ids = asStringArray(q.ids);
  if (ids?.length) {
    where.push(`p.id = ANY($${p}::uuid[])`);
    params.push(ids);
    p += 1;
  }

  const skus = asStringArray(q.skus);
  if (skus?.length) {
    where.push(`p.sku = ANY($${p}::text[])`);
    params.push(skus);
    p += 1;
  }

  const brands = asStringArray(q.brand);
  if (brands?.length) {
    where.push(`p.brand = ANY($${p}::text[])`);
    params.push(brands);
    p += 1;
  }

  const categories = asStringArray(q.category);
  if (categories?.length) {
    where.push(`p.category = ANY($${p}::text[])`);
    params.push(categories);
    p += 1;
  }

  const minPrice = asNumber(q.minPrice);
  if (minPrice != null) {
    where.push(`p.price >= $${p}::numeric`);
    params.push(minPrice);
    p += 1;
  }

  const maxPrice = asNumber(q.maxPrice);
  if (maxPrice != null) {
    where.push(`p.price <= $${p}::numeric`);
    params.push(maxPrice);
    p += 1;
  }

  const minRating = asNumber(q.minRating);
  if (minRating != null) {
    where.push(`p.rating >= $${p}::numeric`);
    params.push(minRating);
    p += 1;
  }

  const inStock = asBoolean(q.inStock);
  if (inStock != null) {
    where.push(`p."inStock" = $${p}::boolean`);
    params.push(inStock);
    p += 1;
  }

  const createdFrom = asString(q.createdFrom);
  if (createdFrom) {
    where.push(`p."createdAt" >= $${p}::timestamptz`);
    params.push(createdFrom);
    p += 1;
  }

  const createdTo = asString(q.createdTo);
  if (createdTo) {
    where.push(`p."createdAt" <= $${p}::timestamptz`);
    params.push(createdTo);
    p += 1;
  }

  const attrs = parseAttributeFilters(q.attrs);
  if (attrs?.length) {
    for (const { key, value } of attrs) {
      where.push(`(p.attributes ->> '${key}') = $${p}::text`);
      params.push(value);
      p += 1;
    }
  }

  const whereSql = where.length ? `WHERE ${where.join(" AND ")}` : "";

  const sortField = normalizeSortField(q.sort);
  const sortDir = normalizeSortDir(q.dir);

  const orderBySql = (() => {
    if (sortField === "price") return `ORDER BY p.price ${sortDir}, p.id ASC`;
    if (sortField === "rating") return `ORDER BY p.rating ${sortDir}, p.id ASC`;
    if (sortField === "createdAt") return `ORDER BY p."createdAt" ${sortDir}, p.id ASC`;
    if (sortField === "name") return `ORDER BY p.name ${sortDir}, p.id ASC`;
    if (sortField === "relevance" && search) {
      const escaped = escapeLike(search);
      const rankParam = `$${p}`;
      params.push(escaped);
      p += 1;
      return `ORDER BY
        (CASE
          WHEN p.name ILIKE (${rankParam} || '%') ESCAPE '\\' THEN 4
          WHEN p.sku ILIKE (${rankParam} || '%') ESCAPE '\\' THEN 3
          WHEN p.name ILIKE ('%' || ${rankParam} || '%') ESCAPE '\\' THEN 2
          WHEN p.sku ILIKE ('%' || ${rankParam} || '%') ESCAPE '\\' THEN 1
          ELSE 0
        END) DESC,
        p."createdAt" DESC,
        p.id ASC`;
    }
    return `ORDER BY p."createdAt" DESC, p.id ASC`;
  })();

  const page = clampInt(asNumber(q.page), 1, 1000000, 1);
  const limit = clampInt(asNumber(q.limit), 1, 200, 24);
  const offset = (page - 1) * limit;

  const limitParam = `$${p++}`;
  params.push(limit);
  const offsetParam = `$${p++}`;
  params.push(offset);

  const dataSql = `
    ${select}
    ${whereSql}
    ${orderBySql}
    LIMIT ${limitParam} OFFSET ${offsetParam}
  `;

  const countSql = `
    SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS count
    FROM products p
    ${whereSql}
  `;

  return { dataSql, countSql, params, page, limit };
}

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

app.get("/api/products/search", async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {
  try {
    const { dataSql, countSql, params, page, limit } = buildProductSearchSql(req.query);
    const repo = getRepository(Product);

    const [rows, countRows] = await Promise.all([
      repo.query(dataSql, params),
      repo.query(countSql, params.slice(0, params.length - 2)),
    ]);

    const total = (countRows?.[0]?.count ?? 0) as number;
    res.json({
      page,
      limit,
      total,
      items: rows,
    });
  } catch (err) {
    next(err);
  }
});

app.use((err: any, _req: Request, res: Response, _next: NextFunction) => {
  const status = typeof err?.status === "number" ? err.status : 500;
  const message = status === 500 ? "Internal Server Error" : String(err?.message || "Error");
  res.status(status).json({ error: message });
});

async function main() {
  await createConnection({
    type: "postgres",
    url: process.env.DATABASE_URL,
    entities: [Product],
    synchronize: false,
    logging: false,
  });

  const port = Number(process.env.PORT || 3000);
  app.listen(port);
}

main().catch((e) => {
  // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
  console.error(e);
  process.exit(1);
});
